name: TE — rootfix-lean (lexprune + root-entry emission + connection traversal)
description: Forks te-lexprune-safe (ptv-lex-weighted + relevance-floor prune) and adds the same two structural recall fixes as te-rootfix, run AFTER the prune on the kept set so they are never pruned: (1) root-collection entry emission keyed off the real query-root type(s) including QueryRoot; (2) connection traversal guarantee (nodes/edges/edges->node on every selected *Connection/*Edge). The prune's own root-field protection is hardened to cover QueryRoot too. Recovers the root-entry recall gain while keeping the prune's token savings.
